target.sql_fulltext: select SUM(P__0),inner_select.par0, inner_select.par1, inner_select.par2, inner_select.par3, inner_select.par4, inner_select.par5, inner_select.par6, inner_select.par7, inner_select.par8, inner_select.par9, inner_select.par10, inner_select.par11, inner_select.par12, inner_select.par13, inner_select.par14, inner_select.par15, inner_select.par16 from (select SUM(a.GRANULARITYPERIOD) P__0 ,a.IPPATHID par0, :1 par1, k.PEERNAME par2, l.SITE_TYPE par3, l.SITE_OPERATOR par4, l.SITE_VENDOR par5, l.SITE_VERSION par6, :2 par7, k.ENODEB_NAME par8, l.ENODEB_CN par9, l.ENODEB_IBGE_ID par10, l.ENODEB_LATITUDE par11, l.ENODEB_LONGITUDE par12, l.ENODEB_MUNICIPALY par13, l.ENODEB_NEIGHBORHOOD par14, l.ENODEB_REGION par15, l.ENODEB_UF par16 from DBN0_HUA_RAN.T1542455302 a, DBN0_EXT_ENRICH.ENR_RADIO_4G5G_HUA_IPPATH k, DBN0_EXT_ENRICH.ENR_RADIO_4G_ENODEB l where a.IPPATHID = k.IPPATH AND a.OBJECT = k.NE_NAME AND a.OBJECT = l.NE_NAME AND a.RESULTTIME>=to_date(:3 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AND a.RESULTTIME<to_date(:4 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AND l.STARTTIME>=to_date(:5 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AND l.STARTTIME<to_date(:6 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') group by k.ENODEB_NAME, a.IPPATHID, a.OBJECT, l.ENODEB_CN, l.ENODEB_IBGE_ID, l.ENODEB_LATITUDE, l.ENODEB_LONGITUDE, l.ENODEB_MUNICIPALY, l.ENODEB_NEIGHBORHOOD, l.ENODEB_REGION, l.ENODEB_UF, l.ERB_FISICA, l.ID_MASTER, l.MOBILE_SITE_NAME, k.PEERIP, k.PEERNAME, l.SITE_OPERATOR, l.SITE_TYPE, l.SITE_VENDOR, l.SITE_VERSION, l.STATION_CODE) inner_select group by inner_select.par0, inner_select.par1, inner_select.par2, inner_select.par3, inner_select.par4, inner_select.par5, inner_select.par6, inner_select.par7, inner_select.par8, inner_select.par9, inner_select.par10, inner_select.par11, inner_select.par12, inner_select.par13, inner_select.par14, inner_select.par15, inner_select.par16 order by inner_select.par0, inner_select.par1, inner_select.par7, inner_select.par8, inner_select.par2, inner_select.par3, inner_select.par4, inner_select.par5, inner_select.par6, inner_select.par9, inner_select.par10, inner_select.par11, inner_select.par12, inner_select.par13, inner_select.par14, inner_select.par15, inner_select.par16

stat.name: Total Number of Rowsets
stat.desc: Total number of rowsets received from underlying input

stat.name: Rowsets Leveraging Storage Aggregation
stat.desc: Number of rowsets leveraging storage aggregation pushdown

stat.name: Slow metadata bytes
stat.desc: Size of slow metadata in bytes

stat.name: SI saved bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes saved by storage index

stat.name: Flash cache bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes fetched from flash cache

stat.name: Partial flash cache and disk bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes where IO was partially fetched from flash cache and disk

stat.name: Columnar cache saved bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes saved by columnar cache

stat.name: Dynamic Scan Tasks on Thread
stat.desc: Number of dynamic scan tasks completed by thread
